title: Session 20 meta-cognitive review: 6 meta-lessons from 19 sessions

content.purpose: Meta-cognitive review of 19 sessions, 48 constraints, and 63 knowledge entries. Identify recurring patterns and extract meta-lessons for forward planning.

methodology.protocol: Full roster review: Rune (constraint taxonomy), Mira (7+2 mapping), Jude (KB consistency), Eli (compile.py fix), Tess (baseline validation), Sage (Stage 3 plan)

meta_lessons.1_flat_landscape: Of all parameters tested across two substrates, almost none are binding. The system is massively degenerate. 7+2 Framework explains: ~10^5 molecular configs → ~10^2 functional states. Most parameter directions don't matter.
meta_lessons.2_timescale_barrier: Three constraints (c036, c047, c048) converge on the same wall: per-step signals cannot capture sequence-level properties. 7+2 names this precisely: plasticity direction requires amplitude × duration (2D discriminant) at intermediate timescale.
meta_lessons.3_negative_results_are_the_output: 48 constraints in 19 sessions = 2.5 closed doors per session. The pattern of elimination IS the search. The remaining solution volume shrinks monotonically.
meta_lessons.4_statistical_maturity: Multi-K averaging (CV 14.8%→5.1%), 10-seed minimum, phased validation. No false positive has survived since Session 15.
meta_lessons.5_amendment1_essential: Vacuous stage declaration prevented deadlock at Stage 3 (Living Seed) and Stage 2 (ANIMA). Both correctly identified: mechanism works, landscape flat, theoretical explanation exists.
meta_lessons.6_substrate_transition_correct: Amendment 2 (forward viability check) caught Living Seed ceiling before wasted optimization. ANIMA has 4.6× MI gap. Constraints transferred as design requirements.

anti_signal.description: Signal drives adaptation in wrong direction (c020, c022, c036)

statistical.description: False positive from insufficient seeds/power — SOLVED by protocol

architectural.description: Structural impossibility (beta/gamma globality, derivative collapse, Living Seed ceiling)

timescale_mismatch.description: Per-step signal cannot capture sequence-level property (c036, c047, c048) — CENTRAL BLOCKER

protocol_methodology.description: Evaluation procedure was wrong — SOLVED by infrastructure

seven_plus_two_mapping.implemented: 3/7 core variables: Vm (x state), {g} (ring topology), {w} (world model W)
seven_plus_two_mapping.missing_critical: [Ca2+]i (dual-timescale calcium), spatial embedding x, neuromodulatory M(t)
seven_plus_two_mapping.key_insight: ANIMA's I has single timescale (tau=0.3). 7+2 calcium control requires dual-timescale: fast error detection + slow amplitude×duration integral. Single-timescale I cannot escape Stage 2.
seven_plus_two_mapping.degeneracy_validation: Non-binding parameters ARE degeneracy — same 10^5:10^2 compression. Confirmed by experiment, explained by theory.

content.kb_integrity: Zero anomalies. 48 constraints sequential c001-c048. All cross-references valid. Canonical params consistent across state.md, anima_organism.py, run_anima_stage1.py.
content.baseline_validation: alive_gap=+0.1256 exact match (d=2.46, 10 seeds × K=[4,6,8,10]). Reproducible.
content.infrastructure_fix: compile.py now ANIMA-aware — entry 064 created, state.md fully derived from entries.
